room.caption: [BubTowerA3] I found it interesting that raocow was LPing Marisa & Alice's Trap Tower when I was making this level.

instance.creationCode: stringToShow="The menu retry option is a quick way to reset a map." signSize=1
sprite_index=sInvisibleSolidMask image_xscale=3 xDir=1 yDir=0 shiftChange=64 spriteChange=13 towerColor=0
